schema.source: string — e.g. LinkedIn, Upwork, Referral, Tender Portal, Conference CFP, Grant Database
schema.type: string — one of: Consulting, Recruiter, Upwork, Speaking, Grant, Other
schema.title: string — role, engagement, or opportunity title
schema.url: string — link to the original listing, if any
schema.status: string — new, contacted, proposal-sent, won, lost, archived
schema.nextAction: string — what happens next and by when
